phrases.intent_en: Ask what is inside the château today
phrases.text_local: Qu'est-ce qu'on peut voir à l'intérieur du château aujourd'hui ?
phrases.pronunciation: kes-KON puh vwar ah lan-tay-RYUR doo shah-TOH oh-zhoor-DWEE
phrases.cultural_note: The Château de Tours houses the Histopad experience, a digital interactive journey through the history of the Loire Valley châteaux using augmented reality.

responses.phonetic: eel ee ah day zex-poh-zee-SYOHN dar kohn-tahm-poh-RAHN
responses.local: Il y a des expositions d'art contemporain.

phrases.intent_en: Ask what exhibitions are on now
phrases.text_local: Quelles sont les expositions en cours ?
phrases.pronunciation: kel sohn lay zex-poh-zee-SYOHN ahn KOOR
phrases.cultural_note: The Château de Tours now houses contemporary art exhibitions and photography shows.

responses.english: It is posted at the entrance.

phrases.intent_en: Ask for directions to the château from the train station
phrases.text_local: Pouvez-vous m'indiquer le chemin vers le château depuis la gare ?
phrases.pronunciation: poo-VAY-voo man-dee-KAY luh shuh-MAN vair luh shah-TOH duh-PWEE lah GAR
phrases.cultural_note: The Château de Tours is about a 15-minute walk from Tours train station along the Loire riverbank, passing through the historic centre.

responses.english: Straight from the station, about ten minutes.
responses.phonetic: too DRWAH duh-PWEE lah GAR ahn-vee-ROHN DEE mee-NOOT
responses.local: Tout droit depuis la gare, environ dix minutes.

phrases.cultural_note: The Château de Tours often has free exhibitions.

phrases.intent_en: Ask about the view over the Loire from the château
phrases.text_local: Peut-on voir la Loire depuis les remparts du château ?
phrases.pronunciation: puh-TON vwar lah LWAR duh-PWEE lay rahm-PAR doo shah-TOH
phrases.cultural_note: The château sits directly on the Loire riverbank; its terrace and gardens offer views along the river, especially picturesque at sunset.

responses.english: From the terrace, the view is nice.
responses.phonetic: duh-PWEE lah tay-RASS lah VOO eh BEL
responses.local: Depuis la terrasse, la vue est belle.
